case_title: BRENNAN, JAMES vs. MACY'S et al

docket_entries.description: OSC CALENDAR OF JAN-28-1998, OFF CALENDAR DISMISSAL FILED ON 1-28-98.

PERSONAL INJURY/PROPERTY DAMAGE - NON-VEHICLE RELATED, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF BRENNAN, JAMES AS TO DEFENDANT MACY'S DOES 1 TO 30 SUMMONS ISSUED STATUS CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR          OCT-17-1997 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  AUG-18-1997 STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT DUE ON       SEP-29-1997
JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED BY PLAINTIFF
PROOF OF SERVICE OSC CALENDAR OF SEP-23-1997, OFF CALENDAR SEPT 23,1997 POS OSC.

STATUS CONFERENCE CALENDAR OF OCT-17-1997, ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR FAILURE TO SERVE DEFENDANT AND FILE PROOF OF SERVICE WITHIN 60 DAYS OF FILING OF COMPLAINT, TO FILE A STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT WITHIN 20 CALENDAR DAYS OF STATUS CONFERENCE DATE (LOCAL RULE 303E4), ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE TO PLT'S ATTY. SEAN ELLIS. HEARING SET FOR NOV-25-1997 AT 02:30 PM IN DEPT X1 NOTICE SENT BY COURT

OSC CALENDAR OF NOV-25-1997, SANCTIONS ORDERED IN THE AMOUNT OF $100.00 FOR FAILURE TO FILE A STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT WITHIN 20 CALENDAR DAYS OF STATUS CONFERENCE DATE (LOCAL RULE 303E4), TO FILE POS AND OBTAIN ANSWER FROM OR ENTER DEFAULT AND DEFAULT JUDGMENT. OSC AND SANCTION AGAINST PLTF'S ATTY ELLIS SEAN, WHO IS REQUIRED TO FILE STATUS STATEMENT 20 DAYS PRIOR TO HEARING., PAYABLE ON OR BEFORE DEC-10-1997 CONTINUED FROM NOV-25-1997 TO JAN-28-1998 AT 02:30 PM NOTICE SENT BY COURT
DISMISSAL WITH PREJUDICE OF COMPLAINT AS TO DEFENDANT MACY'S
ADDED TO PROOF OF SERVICE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE CALENDAR HEARING SET FOR SEP-23-1997 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPT X1
